primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: The following de novo (d.n.) lamin A mutants or mutants associated with Emery-Dreifuss Muscular Dystrophy (EDMD), Limb-Girdle Muscular Dystrophy (LGMD1B), Dilated Cardiomyopathy with Conduction Defects (DCM-CD) and Congenital Muscular Dystrophy (CMD) were used in this study: R7/8E double mutant (d.n.), R25G (EDMD/LGMD1B), E33G (EDMD/LGMD1B), E65G (EDMD/LGMD1B), E82K (DCM-CD), R388C (CMD), R388E (d.n.), R401C (EDMD) and R401E (d.n.).

primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison by phosphorylation, acetylation, ubiquitination, or activation markers.
evidence: To distinguish interactions supporting lamin A homo-dimer subunit assembly and mechanics from those supporting its homo-polymer assembly (i.e. head-to-tail tetramers), we further developed an original CLMS approach utilising EDC chemical cross-linking and SILAC labelling.

attributes.agent: Lamin A mutations (R25G, E33G, E65G, E82K, R388C, R401C, etc.)
evidence: The following de novo (d.n.) lamin A mutants or mutants associated with Emery-Dreifuss Muscular Dystrophy (EDMD), Limb-Girdle Muscular Dystrophy (LGMD1B), Dilated Cardiomyopathy with Conduction Defects (DCM-CD) and Congenital Muscular Dystrophy (CMD) were used in this study: R7/8E double mutant (d.n.), R25G (EDMD/LGMD1B), E33G (EDMD/LGMD1B), E65G (EDMD/LGMD1B), E82K (DCM-CD), R388C (CMD), R388E (d.n.), R401C (EDMD) and R401E (d.n.).

replicate_hints: The experiment was carried out in biological triplicate
multiplex_channel_hints: mix of light and SILAC-labelled heavy lamin A

evidence: statistical significance was estimated in T-test comparison of mutant samples to the control sample.
To distinguish interactions supporting lamin A homo-dimer subunit assembly and mechanics from those supporting its homo-polymer assembly (i.e. head-to-tail tetramers)

targets_and_enrichments.ontology_label: Chemical cross-linking coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Explicit use of SILAC (L-13C615N4-arginine and L-13C615N2-lysine) for quantitative cross-linking mass spectrometry (CLMS) to distinguish intra- and inter-molecular interactions.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment specifically uses EDC (1-ethyl-3-(3-dimethylaminopropyl)carbodiimide hydrochloride) and Sulfo-NHS as zero-length cross-linkers.
